title: Crystalline forms of (cis)-n-(4-(dimethylamino)-1,4-diphenylcyclohexyl)-n-methyl-cinnamamide
abstract: The present invention relates to a crystalline form of the compound according to formula (I) having at least one X-ray powder diffraction peak (CuK 횓짹 radiation) in the range of from 16.5횂짹0.2 to 18.5횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and/or 17.0횂짹0.2 to 19.5횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and/or 22.5횂짹0.2 to 24.5횂짹0.2 (2횓혱).
claims:
Claims Patent claims: 1. A crystalline form of the compound according to formula (I) having at least one X-ray powder diffraction peak (CuK a radiation) in the range of from 16.5횂짹0.2 to 18.5횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and/or 17.0횂짹0.2 to 19.5횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and/or 22.5횂짹0.2 to 24.5횂짹0.2 (2횓혱). The crystalline form according to claim 1 , which is an ansolvate. The crystalline form according to claim 1 or 2, which has at least one additional X-ray powder diffraction peak (CuK a radiation) in the range of from 1 1 .5횂짹0.2 to 13.5횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and/or 14.5횂짹0.2 to 16.5횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and/or 19.0횂짹0.2 to 21 .0횂짹0.2 (2횓혱). The crystalline form according to any of the preceding claims, which is crystalline form A having at least one X-ray powder diffraction peak (CuK a radiation) selected from the group consisting of 18.9횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 17.2횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 23.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 15.1 횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 12.2횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 17.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 17.7횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and 12.5횂짹0.2 (20); or crystalline form B having at least one X-ray powder diffraction peak (CuK a radiation) selected from the group consisting of 23.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 18.8횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 17.1 횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 12.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and 15.1 횂짹0.2 (26); or crystalline form C having at least one X-ray powder diffraction peak CuK a radiation) selected from the group consisting of 17.2횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 18.9횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 12.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 12.2횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 23.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 28.6횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and 17.7횂짹0.2 (26); or crystalline form D having at least one X-ray powder diffraction peak (CuK a radiation) selected from the group consisting of 18.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 19.7횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 12.8횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 17.9횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 17.7횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and 10.6횂짹0.2 (2횓혱). 

 The crystalline form according to claim 4, which is crystalline form A exhibiting in differential scanning calorimetry analysis an endothermic event with an onset temperature in the range of from 159횂째C to 172횂째C and/or a peak temperature in the range of from 161 횂째C to 175횂째C. The crystalline form according to claims 4 or 5, which has X-ray powder diffraction peaks (CuK a radiation) at 18.9횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 17.2횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 23.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 15.1 횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and 12.2횂짹0.2 (2횓혱). The crystalline form according to claim 4, which is crystalline form B exhibiting in differential scanning calorimetry analysis an endothermic event with an onset temperature in the range of from 162횂째C to 173횂째C and/or a peak temperature in the range of from 165횂째C to 176횂째C. The crystalline form according to claim 4 or 7, which has X-ray powder diffraction peaks (CuK a radiation) at 23.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 18.8횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 17.1 횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 12.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and 15.1 횂짹0.2 (2횓혱). The crystalline form according to claim 4, which is crystalline form C exhibiting in differential scanning calorimetry analysis an endothermic event with an onset temperature in the range of from 162횂째C to 172횂째C and/or a peak temperature in the range of from 168횂째C to 179횂째C. 10. The crystalline form according to claim 4 or 9, which has X-ray powder diffraction peaks (CuK a radiation) at 17.2횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 18.9횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 12.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 12.2횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and 23.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱). The crystalline form according to claim 4, which is crystalline form D exhibiting in differential scanning calorimetry analysis a first endothermic event with an onset temperature in the range of from 46횂째C to 56횂째C and/or a peak temperature in the range of from 81 횂째C to 91 횂째C; and a second endothermic event with an onset temperature in the range of from 1 19횂째C to 129횂째C and/or a peak temperature in the range of from 128횂째C to 138횂째C. 2. The crystalline form according to claim 4 or 1 1 , which has X-ray powder diffraction peaks (CuK a radiation) at 18.4횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 19.7횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 12.8횂짹0.2 (2횓혱), 17.9횂짹0.2 (2횓혱) and 17.7횂짹0.2 (2횓혱). 3. A pharmaceutical dosage form comprising at least one crystalline form according to any of claims 1 to 12. 4. A process for preparing a crystalline form according to any of claims 1 to 12, comprising the steps of (i) mixing the compound according to formula (I) with a solvent; (ii) stirring at room temperature or stirring at an elevated temperature the mixture obtained in step (i); (iii) precipitating the compound according to formula (I); (iv) separating the solid obtained in step (iii); and (v) drying the solid obtained in step (iv).
